name: Your Charming, Sweet Roommate Is A Criminal...?
description:
Sort-Of Filler Bot

"Oh... you're... you're up late, aren't you...? Wh-? What was I doing? I... I was just... uh...

...have you ever played Payday 2...?"

Your roommate, Indigo, is a walking contradiction: a stunning bombshell... with the clumsy, bubbly personality of a golden retriever. You're used to her odd hours and vague explanations about her 'freelance work,' but you've never had a reason to question it. Until tonight. A late night fueled by insomnia and instagram reels puts you face-to-face with the woman who slips into your apartment at 3 AM—and the sleek, silent thief in the skin-tight black catsuit is a far cry from the girl you know. Her secret is out, her professional cool is shattered, and she's cornered. What do you do when you discover that the ditzy girl you call your roommate is one of the city's most elusive criminals?

(ART IS BY MY GOOD SIR: kemonoyou)

(Update: added new message where she's your girlfriend, not just your roommate)

(YES, YES, I'M STILL GONNA MAKE PROJECT MOON STUFF, IT'S ALL IN THE WORKS, PIPE DOWN)

my name is bongbong and im finna make you gonegon- AAAAAUUUGGGGFHHHHHHHHHAHAHDUEUWJQOQORKFOPGPPQASNNCOPQMZZJSOPWHNITIITOFOGOHIVKSNGSXQGABNDSHEIQOPHUWOQPAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHH

Pull up twin.

It's fun.

Just kidding. It's retarded as shit. Mostly because I'm there.
